title: Yoshi [Cobblemon]
description: The datapack adds Yoshi to Cobblemon
body:
This datapack adds Yoshi and Baby Yoshi To Cobblemon.
Both Yoshi and Baby Yoshi spawn in forest and plains biomes and Baby Yoshi can be evolved into Yoshi at lvl 15![Baby Yoshi Idle Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac2ec135e336459fb6e31c4175b76323375462a5.gif)
